title: Kinder Morgan to increase gas storage capacity at Texas facility
text: U.S. pipeline operator Kinder Morgan Inc said on Wednesday it plans to expand the working gas storage capacity at its Markham facility in Matagorda County, Texas, by 6 billion cubic feet (Bcf).

title: Kinder Morgan to Increase Storage Capacity on Its Texas Intrastate System
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KMI today announced its plan to expand the working gas storage capacity at its Markham facility in Matagorda County along the Texas Gulf Coast.

title: Energy stocks suffer broad selloff, led by Halliburton, as crude oil falls to more than 5-week low
text: Energy stocks were suffering a broad beating Tuesday, as a selloff in crude prices was exacerbated by a big decline in the broader stock market. The Energy Select Sector SPDR exchange-traded fund XLE sank 4.4% toward a five-week low, with all 23 equity components losing ground.
